epics.title: User Authentication and Authorization
epics.summary: Implement secure authentication and authorization mechanisms.
epics.description: Develop a secure user authentication system using OAuth and implement multi-factor authentication (MFA). Ensure role-based access control to manage user permissions based on their profile and authorization level.

epics.title: Database Schema Design
epics.summary: Design the database schema for storing user data and banking transactions.
epics.description: Create a PostgreSQL database schema to manage user profiles, banking products, transaction histories, and other essential entities. Ensure data normalization and implement necessary indexing for optimal performance.

epics.title: Basic UI Shell
epics.summary: Develop the basic UI shell for the self-service portal.
epics.description: Design the initial user interface using React, providing a responsive layout adaptable to desktop, tablet, and mobile devices. Create a clean, user-friendly design consistent with the bank's branding guidelines.

epics.title: Personalized Dashboard
epics.summary: Create a personalized dashboard displaying relevant banking products and services.
epics.description: Develop a personalized dashboard using React, dynamically displaying banking products and services based on user profile and eligibility. Ensure the dashboard provides a seamless and intuitive user experience.

epics.title: Account Opening Request Workflow
epics.summary: Implement a workflow for submitting account opening requests.
epics.description: Build a streamlined workflow allowing users to submit account opening requests with minimal clicks. Ensure the process is intuitive and allows users to save and resume incomplete applications. Integrate with the core banking system for request processing.

epics.title: Service Modification Workflow
epics.summary: Implement a workflow for submitting service modifications.
epics.description: Build a workflow allowing users to submit requests for modifying existing banking services. Ensure the process is efficient, user-friendly, and integrated with the core banking system for real-time processing.

epics.title: Integration with Core Banking System
epics.summary: Seamlessly integrate the portal with the bank's core banking system.
epics.description: Develop connectors and APIs to integrate the self-service portal with the core banking system. Ensure data synchronization between the systems, providing real-time updates and maintaining data consistency.

epics.title: Real-time Status Updates
epics.summary: Implement real-time status updates for submitted requests.
epics.description: Develop a system to provide users with real-time status updates for their submitted account opening and service modification requests. Utilize WebSockets or polling mechanisms to ensure timely updates.

epics.title: Email Notification System
epics.summary: Set up an email notification system for user updates.
epics.description: Implement an email notification system using FastAPI and Redis, informing users about the status of their requests, incomplete applications, and other important updates.

epics.title: Comprehensive Interaction History
epics.summary: Maintain a comprehensive history of all user interactions.
epics.description: Build a system to log and display a comprehensive history of user interactions on the portal. Ensure that the data is securely stored and easily accessible to users through their dashboards.

epics.title: Save and Resume Incomplete Applications
epics.summary: Enable users to save incomplete applications and resume later.
epics.description: Develop functionality allowing users to save their progress on incomplete applications and resume them at a later time. Ensure that the saved data is securely stored and easily retrievable.

epics.title: Role-based Access Control
epics.summary: Implement role-based access control for user authorization.
epics.description: Enhance the security framework by implementing role-based access control, ensuring that users can only view and access services appropriate to their profiles and authorization levels.

user_stories.epic_title: Implement secure user authentication including multi-factor authentication
user_stories.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
user_stories.description:
As an admin, I want users to complete MFA during login, so that I can ensure higher security.

Core Domain Objects:
- token
- OTP

Attributes & Rules:
- Must send OTP to registered device
- Must verify OTP within 5 minutes
- Must regenerate OTP after expiration

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Successful MFA
Given a user undergoing login
When the user enters a valid OTP within expiration
Then access should be granted
And a new session token should be generated

Scenario: Expired OTP
Given a user undergoing login
When the user enters an OTP after expiration
Then the user should see an OTP expired message
And the OTP should be regenerated and resent

Scenario: Invalid OTP
Given a user undergoing login
When the user enters an invalid OTP
Then the user should see an invalid OTP message
And the login should not be granted

Test Cases:

Feature: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)

Scenario: Successful MFA
Given a user undergoing login
When the user enters a valid OTP within expiration
Then access should be granted
And a new session token should be generated

Scenario: Expired OTP
Given a user undergoing login
When the user enters an OTP after expiration
Then the user should see an OTP expired message
And the OTP should be regenerated and resent

Scenario: Invalid OTP
Given a user undergoing login
When the user enters an invalid OTP
Then the user should see an invalid OTP message
And the login should not be granted

Priority: High - Adds an extra layer of security during login

user_stories.title: Session Management
user_stories.description:
As a user, I want my session to be securely managed, so that my data remains secure during the session.

Core Domain Objects:
- session
- token

Attributes & Rules:
- Must expire session after 30 minutes of inactivity
- Must refresh session token on active use
- Must provide logout functionality

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Session Expiry
Given a user has been inactive for 30 minutes
When the user attempts to perform any action
Then the user should be logged out
And the session should be terminated

Scenario: Session Refresh
Given a user is actively using the application
When the user makes a request
Then the session timer should be reset
And a new session token should be issued

Scenario: User Logout
Given a logged-in user
When the user initiates logout
Then the user should be logged out
And the session should be terminated

Test Cases:

Scenario: Session Refresh

Then the session timer should be reset
And a new session token should be issued

Scenario: User Logout
Given a logged-in user
When the user initiates logout
Then the user should be logged out
And the session should be terminated

Priority: Medium - Ensures that user data is secure during and after the session

user_stories.title: Password Reset
user_stories.description:
As a user, I want to reset my password securely, so that I can regain access to the portal if I forget my password.

Core Domain Objects:
- token
- OTP

Attributes & Rules:
- Must send OTP to registered device
- Must verify identity before allowing password reset
- Must enforce strong password policies

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Successful OTP Verification
Given a user wants to reset their password
When the user enters a valid OTP
Then the user should proceed to reset their password
And a new token should be generated

Scenario: Invalid OTP
Given a user wants to reset their password
When the user enters an invalid OTP
Then the user should see an invalid OTP message
And the password reset should not be granted

Scenario: Password Policy Enforcement
Given a user resetting their password
When the user enters a new password
Then the password must meet the strong password criteria
And if not, the user should see an appropriate error message

Then the user should see an invalid OTP message
And the password reset should not be granted

Scenario: Password Policy Enforcement
Given a user resetting their password
When the user enters a new password
Then the password must meet the strong password criteria
And if not, the user should see an appropriate error message

architecture_generation.description: Azure self-service banking portal where Bank Customer traffic enters via Azure Front Door (WAF/CDN) and reaches a Portal Web App (App Service/Static Web Apps) that authenticates users with Microsoft Entra ID (or Entra ID B2C) and calls Azure API Management for JWT validation, throttling, and routing to backend services (AKS/App Service APIs and Azure Functions/Logic Apps) which persist portal-owned transactional data in Azure SQL Database and store uploaded documents in Azure Blob Storage, with API Management also brokering integrations to the external Core Banking System and backend services using Entra-issued tokens and managed identities for downstream access.
